label_notes: Source: training knowledge (WebFetch blocked 2026-03-20). Based on Midjourney privacy documentation through early 2025. Notable: Midjourney uses user prompts and generated images for model training; this is core to their service but raises privacy concerns. Users should be aware their prompts are used for AI training. Limited transparency on data security certifications.
